title: Occupational Health for Health Care Providers: MedlinePlus
content: Occupational Health for Health Care Providers On this page Basics Summary Start Here Learn More Related Issues Specifics See, Play and Learn No links available Research Statistics and Research Clinical Trials Journal Articles Resources Find an Expert For You Patient Handouts Summary Health care workers are exposed to many job hazards. These can include : Infections Needle injuries Back injuries Allergy-causing substances Violence Stress Follow good job safety and injury prevention practices. They can reduce your risk of health problems. Use protective equipment, follow infection control guidelines, learn the right way to lift heavy objects, and find ways to manage stress.
